title: I Am Big Bird: The Caroll Spinney Story
original_title: I Am Big Bird: The Caroll Spinney Story
overview: A documentary about Caroll Spinney who has been Sesame Street's Big Bird and Oscar the Grouch since 1969. At 78-years-old, he has no intention of stopping.
